item.title: Hey @everyone,
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone,

We've been open about our code, design and culture with you. Now, [**our business metrics**](https://ente.com/open) are open too.

You can read the full announcement here: **[ente.com/blog/open](<https://ente.com/blog/open>)**

These are early days, we've a long road ahead. There may be ebbs, but Ente will flow. Thank you for supporting us! 💚

Ente – Open

Explore Ente's business metrics, updated every month.

item.title: Hi @everyone 👋
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
Hi @everyone 👋

We shipped an update to Ente Photos this week with a fresh coat of paint.

We've been meaning to evolve our design system toward something more fun and relaxed for a while now. Over the last two weeks, we finally got it done. Here's what changed:

* **Refreshed visuals** - buttons, text fields, screen titles, icons, colours, and typography have all been updated to make the app easier on the eye.
* **All albums in one place** - your albums (including on-device and shared) now live on a single screen, listed all at once so you don't have to tap a chevron every time to see your full collection. Links, Uncategorised, Hidden, and Archived are grouped under **More**.
* **A dedicated Feed tab** - replacing the old Shared Albums tab, so it's easy to see what your loved ones are sharing, reacting to, and commenting on.
* **Updated bottom navigation** - new icons and a less rounded look for a more premium feel.

We're still rolling this new design out across the rest of the app, so you'll see more of it in upcoming updates. Eventually it'll come to all our apps on every platform, giving all Ente products a consistent feel while making design and development much faster.

We'd love to hear your thoughts! We're still refining things, so your feedback is genuinely valuable. 🙏

item.title: Hi @everyone! 👋
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
Hi @everyone! 👋
Here's everything we've shipped across Ente products over the past few weeks.

# <:Ente:1355149346093535454> Ente Photos
Lots of under-the-hood improvements, along with a couple of new features to make the experience even better.

- **Pick photos from other apps** - Your Ente library can now be used as a source for supported 3rd party apps like WhatsApp. When any app asks for a photo, you can choose Ente Photos as a source and pick photos directly from your library.
- **Review from your camera app** - Take a shot, see it in Ente. Photos you capture show up immediately for review. Anyone who lives in their camera will feel the difference. Support for this will depend on the camera app you use though.
- **Memory Lane improvements** - Memory Lane now surfaces more of the people in your life. We have also made the animations a lot smoother on the web.
- **Gallery scrolling** - Improvements in the app and networking layers that make the gallery feel smoother than before.
- **High-res photos** - Updated our image viewer to support high resolution images, on both low and high end devices.
- **Snappier map view** - Your memories on the globe, with noticeably faster load times.
- **Faster Memories viewer** - Memories will now load instantly. We have also added haptics for a little extra delight as you flip through.
------

# <:Locker:1439921102452428861> Ente Locker
A big update for Locker, where we shipped a bunch of things you asked for.

- **Legacy Kit** - You can now create a Legacy Kit and share it with 3 trusted people in your life. Any 2 of them can come together to recover access to your account.
- **Share collections as links** - You can now share an entire collection as a link, with options for password gating, link expiry, and more. End-to-end encrypted, of course.
- **Keep critical items offline** - Sometimes you need that ID card exactly when your internet connection breaks. For such moments, we have added an option to keep your most critical documents available offline, so you can access them no matter where you are.
- **Locker on the web** - ICYMI, we launched a web beta for Locker at https://locker.ente.com.
------

# <:Auth:1439920512838012940> Ente Auth
We have made it easier to import your 2FAs from other products.

- **Proton Authenticator** - Ente Auth now supports import from Proton Authenticator, including encrypted exports.
- **Reliable QR and image imports** - Some under-the-hood improvements to make importing QR codes and images more reliable.
------

# <:ensubot:1472870259173097575> Ensu
Ensu got a big update as well.

- **Gemma 4 support** - The newest kid on the block is now the default on desktop and a preset on mobile. Noticeably sharper at reasoning and instruction-following, while still running comfortably on consumer hardware.
- **Talk to Ensu** - Our thoughts are best expressed through our voice. Ensu now lets you speak your queries directly, with voice transcription that runs completely on-device. Try it out!
- **Faster image processing** - We rewrote Ensu's image processing pipeline to make it a lot faster. No more waiting for answers after you upload an image and ask a question.
- **Faster model downloads** - Some love also went towards the initial model download mechanism, which is now way faster and smoother.

That's all for now! If you would like more frequent updates, please subscribe to our <@&1503369065270611998> role.

item.title: Hey @everyone 👋
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
Hey @everyone 👋

Here's what's new in Ente Photos:

## 🕰️ Memory Lane
* See how you and your loved ones have changed across the years
* Open their page from the Search tab to see the Memory Lane
* Share the experience with them via a private link

## 🔗 Share Your Memories
* Saw a memory with a friend and want to send it their way?
* Share any memory as a link — they'll get the same experience right in their browser
* All memory and memory lane links self-destruct after 7 days

## 🚀 Faster Links
* Public Links will now load way faster than before
* We refactored our web app and got a 80% reduction in the initial payload to achieve this speed up

## 🔒 App Lock on Desktop
* You can now setup app lock on the desktop app
* PIN and Password lock on all platforms
* Device/Biometric lock on MacOS

## 📷 QR Code Detection
* We have added QR code detection on the mobile app
* Long-press any photo containing a QR code to instantly reveal what's behind it

## 🔤 Text Selection
* Selecting text from photos just got smoother
* Long-press on any text to scan it, then select exactly what you need

## 🙋 And More...
* In-app family management
* Background ML processing for gallery mode
* Storage card now refreshes on quota updates
* Better messaging for incomplete signups
* Resumable ML model downloads on gallery mode
* Fixed startup auto-logout cleanup
* Fixed file downloads broken by stale local ID references

---

We ran an internal hackathon last weekend — here's what the team shipped:

- [2of3](https://2of3.ente.com) — Enter secret, get 3 cards, recover with 2
- [Ask Ducky](https://askducky.app) — Ducky answers your privacy questions
- [Be Fake](https://befa.ke) — Fake enough for Instagram? find out
- [Ducky Dash](https://toys.ente.com/duckydash) — Dodge, jump, outrun the T-Rex
- [Entegrity](https://entegrity.gg) — Unlock secrets by acing the game
- [Gone Tomorrow](https://gonetomorrow.fyi) — Is your family prepared for life without you?
- [Looks Like Me](https://lookslikeme.fyi) — She has your eyes. But whose nose?
- [Photobook](https://photobook.ente.com) — Turn your memories into a beautiful photobook
- [Screenshot Court](https://screenshotcourt.com) — Roast your friends from a text chain
- [The Scary Part](https://thescarypart.org) — What big tech hopes you never read
- [Treasure Hunt](https://discord.com/channels/948937918347608085/953968250553765908/1491048441747341332) - Someone tried sneaking in to our office
- [Wizard of the Ducky Land](https://wizardofduckyland.com) — The wizard knows yours story

Tell us which ones you liked in <#953968250553765908> 💬

item.title: # <:Locker:1439921102452428861> Ente Locker on Web 🌐
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
# <:Locker:1439921102452428861> Ente Locker on Web 🌐

Hey @everyone,

Locker's web beta is available now @ [**locker.ente.io**](https://locker.ente.io)

Please share your thoughts in <#1439920913096380537>

Ente Locker

Store your important documents and credentials. Share them with trusted contacts or pass them on in emergencies.

item.title: Hey @everyone,
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone,

We're moving from ente.io → **[ente.com](https://ente.com)**

This is a milestone for Ente, thank you for the support! <:duckyheart:1317030553555304459>

item.title: Hey @everyone 👋
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
Hey @everyone 👋

We have shipped a ton of new things in Photos.

## 🖼️ Use Ente Photos without an account
* Smart search, face recognition, and curated memories - try without signing up
* This is our first step towards a great offline gallery experience
* We’ll keep improving this, so tell us what you’d like to see next

## 🧱 Masonry layout for public links
* Sharing with friends who aren’t on Ente got better
* A beautiful masonry layout is now the default for shared links
* You can also customise shared album links with masonry, trip, and grouped layouts

## 🔗 Quick links on desktop
* You can now create quick links from the web and desktop app
* Single photo and video links will now directly open the item in your browser

## 🧑‍🧑‍🧒‍🧒 One Feed to rule them all
* See incoming shared albums and photos directly on your feed
* Notifications for sharing activity will now take you to the feed, so you have a single place to see all new activities
* If you haven’t already, get your family onto Ente and start sharing now!

## ⚡ Machine learning improvements
* We have integrated a vector DB - making searches much faster
* People suggestions are now backed by this new engine, resulting in more accurate recommendations
* We're now moving to a shared, highly performant Rust core that will result in improvements across the board

## ⌛ Custom recovery time for Legacy
* You can now set the waiting period for your account recovery
* Choose among 7, 14 and 30 days for each of your trusted contact

## 🙈 Better hidden photos management on mobile
* Delete hidden files from your device so they are actually hidden
* Clean up hidden files from non-hidden albums
* Hide shared albums

## ✋ and there’s more
* Ignore already named people on mobile
* More collage layouts
* Search on-device albums
* Catalan support across all platforms
* Fixed window controls hiding app UI on iPadOS
* Fixed iOS video player crash
* Fixed broken map view
* Fixed pinch to zoom opening info sheet on video
* Fixed file picker galleries getting clipped on wider screens

---

In case you missed our AMA last week, here's the full recording: https://youtu.be/3lkTspvi_mM
We covered a lot - our team, our products, our vision, and what's next. Check it out, and let us know if anything was left unanswered!

Ente AMA – 2026

The Ente team sits down to answer every question our community has to ask. Featuring Vishnu (Founder & CEO), Setal (Product), Laurence (ML) and Shanthy (moderator). Chapters: 00:00 Intro 01:12 New office 02:40 Team 03:33 Face recognition improvements 04:35 Categorizing faces 05:18 Pet recognition 05:56 Nested albums 09:18 Storage saver 10:27 P...

item.title: @everyone We're going live in 15 minutes. Do join - https://discord.com/events/948937918347608085/1474363614654890014
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
@everyone We're going live in 15 minutes. Do join - https://discord.com/events/948937918347608085/1474363614654890014

Feel free to ask questions on the chat. We will take those up at the end.

item.title: # Ensu by Ente Labs
item.dc:creator: Prateek
item.description:
# Ensu by Ente Labs

Hi @everyone, we’re excited to announce **Ensu**, Ente’s local LLM app.

Ensu is our first step toward a private, personal AI that runs entirely on your device. No ads, no tracking. Just an LLM that works offline and keeps your conversations with you.

This is an **Ente Labs** project, and has some rough edges. The intent is to build in public and iterate on feedback. The app is open source, cross-platform, and powered by a shared Rust core. Encrypted sync and more advanced workflows are on the roadmap.

More [**details available here**](https://ente.io/blog/ensu) and you can [**download Ensu here**](<https://ente.io/ensu/>).

Try it out and share your thoughts in <#1478285388849221682>.

item.title: Hey @everyone, 2 updates.
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, 2 updates.

# 1. Locker <:Locker:1439921102452428861>

Locker is officially out of Beta. Thank you for testing and sharing feedback!

Starting today, you can use Locker to
- save important documents, notes, passwords, and more
- organize them into collections
- share them with links
- set up trusted contacts to access them in your absence

Please setup Locker for your family: [ente.io/locker](https://ente.io/locker) 🙏

# 2. AMA <:ama:1355149352691302401>

We'll be hosting our annual AMA on Discord on [4th March](https://discord.gg/ente-community-948937918347608085?event=1474363614654890014).
Please [ask us anything here](<https://ente.sh/ama-2026>).

Ente Locker - Safe space for your most important documents

Store your important documents and credentials. Share them with trusted contacts or pass them on in emergencies.

item.title: Hey @everyone 👋
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
Hey @everyone 👋

Over the last couple of weeks we’ve been **heads-down** improving the Ente Photos apps — **here’s what we shipped**

## ⚙️ Redesigned Settings (Mobile)
- **Revamped layout** to make settings easier to find and navigate
- NEW: **Search within settings**
- Would love your feedback on the new layout + visual style

## 🤐 Download Albums as ZIP
- You can now download large albums as **multiple ZIP files**
- Available in the **web app** and on **all public links**
- One of the most requested features — would make album downloads easier

## 📱 Improvements on Mobile
* Notifications for likes and comments
* Faster search tab loading
* Search bar moved to top
* Search results screen redesign
* Search in discovery, location, file types
* Admins and album owners can delete comments
* Pinch to zoom on video
* View ignored persons
* Better merge people flow
* Search & sort on people page
* Consistent contact sorting
* Preview unsupported formats
* Collage editor improvements
* Performance and stability fixes

## 🖥️ Web/Desktop Improvements
* Hide shared albums
* Right-click context menu for photos
* Cleanup large photos and videos
* Clean uncategorised photos
* Sort albums when uploading, adding, moving photos
* Ability to select all photos in gallery and albums
* Ability to edit location
* More sorting options for your album list
* Upload directly to hidden albums
* Faster map view rendering
* Redesigned login and signup interface

---

The two January 2026 releases sets the tone for the rest of the year: **raising the overall quality and experience of Ente Photos**, and making **sharing + engaging with loved ones** feel effortless (likes, comments, admin role are just the start).

item.title: Hey @everyone 👋
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
Hey @everyone 👋

Starting 2026 with a fresh set of updates for Ente Photos ✨

## 💚 Likes and Comments
Photos are how a lot of conversations start. And now Ente makes that easier.
You can now **like and comment** on shared photos.

* Available on **all platforms**
* Also works on **public links** (so friends/family without Ente can join in too)
* New reactions + comments show up in the **Shared** tab

Try it out and tell us what you think - we’re planning to continue improving the experience.

## 🤵 Admin role in Albums
Managing your shared albums just got a whole lot easier.
You can now **assign another Ente user as an admin** for an album.

Admins can:
* Remove photos
* Manage participants
* Suggest photo deletions (for those “oops” moments)

## 🗺️ Map view on Desktop
Your memories laid out on a world map.

Available now on the web + desktop app, for both:
* An **album**
* Your **entire library**

## 🗞️ Friendship w/ Windscribe
Windscribe VPN is a new friend, joining Kagi, Tuta and Notesnook

* Ente subscribers get a 3 month free trial and $20 off after that
* More @ [ente.io/friends](https://ente.io/friends)

## 🇧🇪 FOSDEM 2026
Team Ente will be at **FOSDEM 2026** on the weekend of 31st Jan.
<@541493647674441729> and <@806467341705412608> are looking forward to meeting you!

* Drop a message in <#1461698493176479867> if you’re coming
* We’re bringing **free merch** — [fill this form](https://forms.ente.io/s/cmkgkycnz0018oi0196rm2xi8) to claim yours

comments_and_likes.mp4

item.title: Hi @everyone, some Christmas goodies for all of you 🎄
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
Hi @everyone, some Christmas goodies for all of you 🎄

## 🧘 Rituals
* For a lot of us, photos are more than preserving moments
* We use them to build habits and track progress - workouts, eating, and more
* We built Rituals so you can start new habits and track your progress through photos
* [Read more about why we built this](https://ente.io/blog/rituals/) and let us know what you think

## 🔗 Public Links for everyone
* Public links can now be created and shared by Ente users on the free plan
* We had earlier restricted links for free users to prevent abuse
* There is a device limit of 5 for viewing links, which will prevent abuse while taking care of genuine cases

## 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Tag People manually
* You can now tag people manually even if they are not in photos
* This has been a highly requested feature, especially when you have shared a moment with someone not in the frame
* Some folks in the team are using this to tag their pets, though you can only do it if atleast one pet face is detected by the on-device AI

## 🛠️ Other Improvements
* You can now pin shared albums too
* Album links would be visible to other participants so they can copy and share if needed
* An updated photo view design and a new favorite icon to make room for upcoming features (Guess what?)

## <:Auth:1439920512838012940> Auth
* We have added an icon picker, so you can go back to the old icon if you were more fond of it
* You can now import andOTP encrypted backups

## <:Locker:1439921102452428861> Locker
* You can now customise Legacy to have a custom time for account recovery
* We have also enabled the ability to share collections to other Ente users
* We are now building up towards a public release, so a lot of improvements upcoming
* If you havent tried Locker, you can try it out on [Android](https://play.google.com/apps/testing/io.ente.locker) or [iOS](https://testflight.apple.com/join/rbmJYPz1). Do share your thoughts in <#1439920913096380537>

## 📻 Vishnu's Podcast
* Vishnu sat down with Kailash Nadh, CTO of Zerodha, and founder, FLOSS/fund
* Kailash is a massive force in the Indian Open Source ecosystem
* FLOSS/fund has recently also given a total of $1M to FFmpeg, OpenStreetMaps, ImageMagick, and Ente among others
* Check out the full video - [Kailash Nadh on building Zerodha](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DAiJD3cGFN8&t=1s)

## 🔮 2026
* We are really excited about what 2026 will look like for all Ente products
* Photos remain our primary product and we have a lot of exciting features lined up for 2026
* We are also planning to spend a lot of time in Q1 polishing Photos from an experience standpoint, and iron out small inconveniences
* Auth, an already well rounded product, is expected to continue improving, while we gear up to launch Locker publicly and make it useful for more people

That's all from us for 2025. Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays and see you in 2026!

C1320.mp4

item.title: Hey @everyone,
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone,

We held our **first hackathon** at Ente today. Sharing some of the projects that were built.

# <:coolducky:1355149348698198076> [drip.ente.io](https://drip.ente.io)
Swap fits, shades, and vibes to make one of 18,144 duckies.

# 🔥 [roastmy.photo](https://roastmy.photo/)
You vs 4 AIs. No mercy, no filters. Vote for the roast that hurt the most.

# ⚔️ [versus.space](https://versus.space/)
It's no longer a poll, it is a WAR.

# 💬 [ensu.ente.io](https://ensu.ente.io)
Run LLMs locally in your browser. 100% private, on-device AI chat powered by WebGPU.

# 🖼️ [ente offline](https://github.com/neeraj-pilot/ente/releases/latest)
Android app that lets you experience all of Ente's machine learning goodies, without an account.

# 🤳 [befa.ke](https://befa.ke)
Post unhinged captions about your most mundane photos. Destroy Instagram.

---

Happy holidays! <:duckyheart:1317030553555304459>

ente-hackathon-behind-the-scenes.mp4

item.title: Hi @everyone, sending some Holiday cheers your way 🎉
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
Hi @everyone, sending some Holiday cheers your way 🎉

## <:duckyheart2:1376623393419296871> Ente Rewind 2025
* Look back at the year gone by
* Your best moments, your favorite people, your beloved spots and a lot more!
* Available on the mobile app starting this weekend

## 🖥️ Photos desktop
* Search with Cmd/Ctrl + K
* Pin important people
* View and terminate sessions
* Greek language support and [more](https://ente.io/help/photos/changelog)

## <:Ente:1355149346093535454> Photos mobile
* Jump to date from memories and photos
* Faster video editing
* OCR support for HEIC
* Better merge people experience and [more](https://ente.io/help/photos/changelog#v1-2-20-mobile-nov-2025)

## <:Auth:1439920512838012940> Auth
* Select multiple codes and take bulk actions
* Scan codes from gallery
* Automatic on-device exports
* Quick settings tile on Android
* Better sorting and [more](https://ente.io/help/auth/changelog)

## 💸 Grant from [FLOSS/fund](https://floss.fund/)
* Ente received a $25,000 grant
* Other grantees include FFmpeg, Blender, ImageMagick, OSM

## 🎙️ Vishnu's Podcast
* [Vishnu chats with Kagi's CEO](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nr_qOQ1qdcE)
* Covers privacy, future of the web, and building mission-driven products
* [Please subscribe](https://www.youtube.com/@vishnu.mohandas)

## <:Locker:1439921102452428861> Locker in open beta
* Now available to free Photos and Auth users
* Try it out on [Android](https://play.google.com/apps/testing/io.ente.locker) or [iOS](https://testflight.apple.com/join/rbmJYPz1)
* Please share feedback and bugs on <#1439920913096380537>

We have a bunch of goodies lined up for early 2026. Happy Holidays from all of us!! <:duckyheart:1317030553555304459>

item.title: Hey @everyone, here is
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, here is
# <:Locker:1439921102452428861> Ente Locker

Locker is a safe space to store, share, and pass down important information.

Starting now, **paid customers of Photos can use Locker** to
- store 1,000 documents, notes, secrets, and more
- share privately using links
- pass them down to trusted contacts

Everything, end-to-end encrypted.

Locker is currently in **beta** and limited to the **first 100 customers** (we'll expand to more soon). We're running this beta so we can share our vision for Locker with you and gather feedback as we polish rough edges.

👉 You can access beta releases of Locker for **[Android here](https://play.google.com/apps/testing/io.ente.locker)** and for **[iOS here](https://testflight.apple.com/join/rbmJYPz1)**.

Please check them out and report bugs in <#1439920913096380537>!

-# p.s. Locker is not a drive! 🙂

item.title: You know what's better than an ice cream scoop? Two ice cream scoops!
item.dc:creator: Manav
item.description:
You know what's better than an ice cream scoop? Two ice cream scoops!

@everyone new builds out for mobile and desktop

## Mobile gets

- OCR! Select text from your photos and screenshots ([Details](https://ente.io/help/photos/features/utilities/detect-text))
- Swipe to select. Why lift a finger when you can just slide <:coolducky:1355149348698198076> Use the swipe gesture to quickly select photos in your gallery.
- New memories to freshen up your life - long forgotten photos of "Winter adventures", "Neon nights", and more.
- Gallery now supports landscape layout (does anyone use that on their phone?)

## Desktop gets

- Album filtering 🔍 All album selection dialogs allow you to filter the list to quickly jump to one-you-want™
- Quicker way to create new albums without uploading photos to them
- Trip layout, custom domains, embed HTML - all the recent sharing improvements now come to desktop too
- Windows auto update fix. Those of you faced issue when auto updating will still face it this time (since the fix will come in effect the next time around), but beyond the storm there is calm

## ~~Serious~~ Fun stuff

* [Ente's Autumn Playlist](https://ente.io/blog/r/playlist-autumn-2025/) 🎧
* Ducky on [books](https://joy.ente.io/books/)
* Part Deux of [Vishnu's podcast with Mo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W8cWAUPz8nI)
* [Decentralize AI](https://ente.io/blog/r/i-have-been-thinking-about-control/)

## Upcoming

* Ente's getting another security audit! Feels nicer than a mud bath. Results soon
* A beta of Ente Locker, only for you all lovely folks on Discord
* A new partner in [Ente's Friend alliance](https://ente.io/friends/) (guess who!)
* Features <:duckychill:1380277696436637697> . Yes.

item.title: Hi @everyone, some Diwali goodies 🪔
item.dc:creator: Manav
item.description:
Hi @everyone, some Diwali goodies 🪔

## 🗺️ Map view for trips
* New map-based "trip layout" when creating public links for your shared albums
* Showcase that crazy roadtrip 🏍️, or that idyllic excursion you took in the French countryside 🥖
* Also a new "continuous" layout - photos show together without date separators

## 🖥️ Embed Ente albums in your own website
* Blogs, photography portfolios, technical explainers, family showcases, event highlights
* Your site, your content, Ente takes care of the grunt work
* [Know more](https://ente.io/blog/embed-ente-albums/)

## 🤳 Sharing wins
* Quickly share public links using a QR code
* Restrict folks from joining via your public link
* Widgets now support shared albums

> Did you know: Ente was the official photo storage provider at IndiaFOSS 2025

## 📱 App wins
* Guest view per-album
* Add to album directly from photo viewer
* Simpler location view in photo details

## 🎮 Game!
* Hungry for privacy? See how many cookies you can have in 30 secs
* Play: **[consent.gg](https://consent.gg)**

## 🏙️ New Office
* Ente keeps growing<:duckyparty:1317030551474933800> We moved into a new, larger office!
* [From one person's dream to a family of dreamers](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XplgM_m6grQ)
* Jay from Ente's support team wrote how [working at Ente changed the way they care about photos](https://ente.io/blog/the-way-i-see-photos/)

## 📻 Vishnu's Podcast
* Vishnu in convo with privacy ecosystem leaders
* Episode I - Carl Dong, Founder CEO of Obscura VPN — ["Do you walk around with your pants off all day?"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5zP_XKaM-7g)
* Episode II - Mo Bitar, Founder of Standard Notes — ["I love building note taking apps"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2l_W6Kutv7w)
* You all suggested Vlad from Kagi and Andy from Proton. We followed through, and one of them is Vishnu's next guest!

👉 **[Subscribe on YouTube to be notified when the episode is out](https://www.youtube.com/@vishnu.mohandas)**

item.title: # <:duckyannounce:1376623483483848875>
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
# <:duckyannounce:1376623483483848875>
Hi @everyone, a new release for Ente is out. And an announcement

## 🪄 Find and clear similar images
* Cleaning up your library just got easier and faster
* New ML based system to detect photos similar to each other
* Go to Settings -> Backup -> Free up space

## 🎁 Custom domains
* Personalise your Ente links with custom domains
* Set it up on Ente's web app with your own domain
* More details [here](https://help.ente.io/photos/features/custom-domains/)

## 💪 Video streaming improvements
* Now trigger stream generation manually
* Updated settings screen to show progress

## 📺 Cast to Apple TV
* Now cast your albums directly to Apple TV
* Search for Ente Cast on the tvOS store

## <:duckyparty:1317030551474933800> A new ducky themed icon
* Customise how ente appears on your home screen
* On popular demand, launching a new ducky themed icon
* Go to Settings -> General -> Advanced -> App icon

## 🤝 Friendship with Kagi
* [New partnership program](https://ente.io/blog/launching-friends/) to promote other privacy focussed products
* Starting with Kagi Search - all Ente subscribers get a 3 month free trial
* Check out https://ente.io/friends

## <:duckyheart2:1376623393419296871> Supporting Ente
If you like what we're doing, please consider supporting us by
* Telling your friends about us
* Leaving a review on the [app stores](https://ente.io/app)
* Giving us a star on [GitHub](https://github.com/ente-io/ente)

item.title: Hey @everyone, here are some goodies.
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, here are some goodies.

# ✨ Smart Albums
- Automatically add photos of your favorite people to an album
- Both new and existing albums now have an option to "auto-add people"
- Album collaborators can also "auto-add people"

# ✏️ Advanced Image Editor
- Packed with beautiful filters
- Enhanced cropping with fixed aspect ratios
- Freehand drawing
- Emoji stickers
- Knobs to adjust brightness, contrast, temperature, saturation and a lot more

# ⚡️ Gallery v2!
We rewrote our gallery from scratch. This allows us to add mosaic and other type of layouts in the future with ease. But future is too far, already you can see advantages of the rewrite.
- Zap through your gallery faster – loading, scrolling, organizing – everything is faster
- Group your photos by day, month, week or year
- Customize further with grid size settings for your perfect layout
- Quickly jump across your timeline with year markers

# 🐧 Flatpak Release
- Available @ [flathub.org/apps/io.ente.photos](https://flathub.org/apps/io.ente.photos)
- Thanks to the open source community for making this happen 💚

# 🪄 More Improvements
- Support for multiple date formats in search
- Improvements to face recognition and memory computation
- Updated settings for memories and gallery

# ❓ What's Next
- Drag to select
- Jump to specific dates
- Maps on desktop
- Custom domains for albums
- Cleaning up "similar" images
- Video streaming (out of beta)
- Local-first mode on mobile
- Mosaic layouts

# <:joy:1402991225547657326> Joy of Computing @ **[joy.ente.io](https://joy.ente.io)**
- Join Ducky every Monday, with the best of the best from the week's reading list. Goes great with your favorite music playlist and a hot cup of coffee.
- Read it online on **[joy.ente.io](https://joy.ente.io)**, or get it delivered to your email.
- Have something you'd like Ducky to read? Send it to `joy@ente.io` <:ducky_happy_zoomed:1213475742285955153>

item.title: # <:duckyannounce:1376623483483848875>
item.dc:creator: setal
item.description:
# <:duckyannounce:1376623483483848875>
Hi @everyone, we have a new release for Ente Photos, that brings in a bunch of improvements.

## ⚡️ Performance improvements
* Lots of small changes to make the app perform much better
* Gallery should have much smoother scroll now
* More improvements expected over the next few releases

## 👩 Improvements to Facial Recognition
* Proactive suggestions for face review
* See all detected faces in people list
* Better tagging flow for single photos
* Under the hood clustering improvements

## 🖼️ Slideshow in Memories
* Memories will now autoplay as a slideshow
* Improvements in visual experience and interactions

## 🎂 Birthday Memories and Notifications
* New memory to celebrate the birthdays of your loved ones
* Opt-out notifications for all saved birthdays

## ⬆️ Background Uploads
* Significantly better background sync experience on iOS

## 🔃 Resumable Uploads and Downloads
* Resumable uploads now available for everyone
* Downloads are resumable too to improve large files experience

## 🦣 Uploading Large Video Files
* Upload limit has been increased to 10GB
* Supported by work on resumable uploads, downloads and video streaming (beta)

## 👷 Coming Up
* Gallery rewrite for better performance
* Drag to select
* Jump to year/date
* Video streaming (out of beta)
* Local-first mode on mobile
* Smart albums
* Library clean up
* Better image editor

## <:duckyheart2:1376623393419296871> Supporting Ente
If you like what we're doing, please consider supporting us by
* Telling your friends about us
* Leaving a review on the [app stores](https://ente.io/app)
* Giving us a star on [GitHub](https://github.com/ente-io/ente)

item.title: Hey @everyone, here with some improvements to your favorite photos app! <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, here with some improvements to your favorite photos app! <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

# <:v1:1355149346093535454> v1.1
This release contains the most number of fixes and performance improvements, ever.
That's not all, we've packed some goodies that we hope you'll enjoy.

# <:ducky_happy_zoomed:1213475742285955153> Powerful widgets

Ente Photos now supports 3 types of home screen widgets
- People – ground yourself with memories of your favorite people
- Albums – quickly access your favorite album(s)
- Memories – relive auto curated and time based memories
You can configure who and what you'd like to see on your home screen from Settings > General > Widgets.

# 🌅 On this day

You will be notified when there are memories to revisit from that particular day.
You can opt-out from Settings > General > Notifications.

## 💚 Share favorites

You can now share your favorites album with your favorite people.
This makes it easy to share your best moments with a single tap.

## ☑️ Bulk actions for albums

You can long-press to select multiple albums and share / pin / archive / hide them in one shot.
You can also organize photos into multiple albums in one shot.

## <:duckyheart:1317030553555304459> Contact page

Opening a contact from the Shared tab will present a timeline with the albums and photos they've shared with you.

## ⏯️ Video streaming (beta)

Video streaming is now available everywhere!
You can watch a sample stream (of one of my favorite documentaries) here: [**The Internet's Own Boy**](https://albums.ente.io/?t=4RwPHAvo#7Hb2cAxrZPs6bt2yW6t5N5y6sQETbXhq8Un2uTrrXL38).
You can create streams for your already uploaded videos, by opening the latest version of our desktop app and turning on Settings > Preferences > Streamable videos.

# ❓ What's next

These are the next set of features we are working on.
- Improvements to face recognition
- Local-first mode for mobile, so Ente Photos can be used without an account
- Launching video streaming (out of beta)
- Increasing the file size limit
- Background sync on iOS
- Smart albums
- Gallery rewrite to support mosaic layouts and gestures like drag-to-select

# <:duckyparty:1317030551474933800> Supporting Ente
If you like what we're doing, please consider supporting us by
- Telling your friends about us
- Leaving a review on the app stores
- Giving us a [star on GitHub](https://github.com/ente-io/ente)

item.title: @everyone Community AMA starting in [**20 minutes**](https://discord.gg/mcwkDTck?event=1355161143013937273)! <:ama:1355149352691302401>
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description: @everyone Community AMA starting in [**20 minutes**](https://discord.gg/mcwkDTck?event=1355161143013937273)! <:ama:1355149352691302401>

item.title: Hey @everyone, happy to share that Ente Photos has reached...
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, happy to share that Ente Photos has reached...

# v1 <:duckyparty:1317030551474933800>

This is our first major release, acknowledging the product's polish.
For those who have been with us so far on this journey, thank you, we have a long way to go!

# Icon <:v1:1355149346093535454>

We've spent over a year painting pixels, and we've found an icon that best represents us.
We hope you like it! If you don't, we've added an icon switcher so you can switch to the original.

# Memories <:duckyheart:1317030553555304459>

Ente Photos will bring back special moments from past trips and celebrations, highlight your best photos and the important people in your life.
All of the magic will run locally on your devices.

# Widgets <:ducky_happy:1213475744835969095>

You can now add home screen widgets on both Android and iOS.
The widget will cycle through your memories, showing flashes from your past, without you having to open the app.

# Improvements ✨
- Browse photos faster on desktop with our new photo viewer and keyboard shortcuts
- Set storage limits for members on your family plan
- Shift the time multiple photos were clicked at, in one shot
- Self host Ente, with [one command](https://ente.io/blog/self-hosting-quickstart/)
- Many bug fixes and performance improvements – this is our most stable release yet

# 10 GB <:free:1355149355186913450>

To celebrate this release, we're doubling the limit of our free tier to 10 GB.
This means you can get upto 20 GB for free by referring your friends!

# Merch <:merch:1355149348698198076>

We've added more items to our shop @ [shop.ente.io](https://shop.ente.io).
As a thank you for helping us reach where we are, here's a $50 coupon (limited to the first 50): `COMMUNITY`.

# AMA <:ama:1355149352691302401>

We are hosting a live community AMA [next weekend](https://discord.gg/mcwkDTck?event=1355161143013937273).
If you have any questions you'd like to ask the team, please add them here: [ente.sh/ama](https://ente.sh/ama).

---

Thanks again, and see you soon!

item.title: Hey @everyone, here are some updates! 💝
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, here are some updates! 💝

# Faces to Contacts 🙋
You can now connect the people in your photos to their Ente accounts, end-to-end encrypted.
This will improve your sharing experience by a bit now, by a lot soon.

# Search Shared Photos 🔍
Machine learning indexes will now be shared, end-to-end encrypted. So you can now
1. search for photos shared with you
2. use our desktop app to index backlogs in libraries shared with you

# Deep Links 🔗
Links to albums will now open in-app instead of the browser.
You can join these albums to subscribe to updates and to upload your photos from Ente.

# Light on Desktop ☀️
Our desktop and web apps have been revamped to support light theme.
We've also overhauled our thumbnail generator and Google Photos importer.

# Video Streaming (beta) ⏯️
On mobile, you can opt-in from `Settings > General > Advanced > Video streaming`.
Once processed, videos will present an option to view their stream. Please share feedback on the quality!

# Ente turned 5 🎂
Thank you for being with us on this amazing journey – **[ente.io/blog/5-years-of-ente](https://ente.io/blog/5-years-of-ente/)** <:duckyheart:1317030553555304459>

item.title: Hello, here's something nice! 🎅
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hello, here's something nice! 🎅

# <@&1099362028147183759> v4.2.0

## Sorting ↕️
You can **drag and drop** your codes to sort them in an order that you like best. You can also configure auto-sort by frequency, recency, and more.

## Icon picker 🎨
Now pick icons from our library for your codes.

## HTML export 🧑‍💻
You can export your data into a single page HTML. This will contain all your data + QR codes that can be easily scanned by other Authenticator apps.

## Dedupe codes 👯
View and remove duplicates in a single click.
Settings > Data > Duplicate codes.

---

Happy holidays! <:heartducky:1316854908313403482>

item.title: Hey @everyone,
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone,

We're wrapping 2024 with [**Legacy**](https://ente.io/blog/legacy/). You can now setup a contact to inherit your Ente account <:duckyparty:1317030551474933800>

This has been a great year for Ente, we hope it has been for you too.

Thank you for hanging out with us, it's been an absolute delight! <:duckyheart:1317030553555304459>

Legacy

Introducing account inheritance to Ente

item.title: Hey,
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey,

Machine Learning is finally out of beta! Thanks to everyone who helped us over the last year with feedback and more! We've published a whitepaper that documents the underlying novelties @ **[ente.io/ml](https://ente.io/ml)**.

On a different note, <@806467341705412608> and I will be in San Francisco next week to attend Mozilla's Demo Day. If anyone is around and would like to hang out, please DM! <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

item.title: Hey @everyone, time for goodies! 🎁
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, time for goodies! 🎁

# Advanced Search 🔍

Find photos by chaining together multiple filters - faces, location, albums, file types, and some magic.
This will help you discover memories you've made with your favorite people, at your favorite places, doing your favorite things.

# ML Lite 🏋️

Machine learning will now run on low end devices, thanks to the multiple optimizations we've shipped.
We've also added a read-only mode so you can configure the app to search but not index.

# Desktop Improvements 🖥️

You can now merge faces and view suggestions on our desktop app as well.
This release also includes improvements to allow backing up of very large libraries.

# [Marketing Experiment](https://theyseeyourphotos.com) 🚀
To show case how much Big Tech can infer from your photos, we built **[theyseeyourphotos.com](https://theyseeyourphotos.com)**.
If you've friends who might be unaware, please consider sharing this with them.

# [Last Black Friday Sale](https://community.ente.io/blackfriday) 💚

We weren't explicit about whether or not we'd be doing a sale this year, and some folks were looking forward to it.
So here's early access to what will be our **last** Black Friday sale: **[community.ente.io/blackfriday](https://community.ente.io/blackfriday)**

--

We're continuing our march towards **v1**. It is symbolic of all the work that has gone into Ente over the last 4 years, and we'll be there soon!

Thank you for all the support and love! <:pepeheart:972766549960192070>

item.title: Hey @everyone, Auth has graduated to v4.0 <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, Auth has graduated to v4.0 <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

v4.0 introduces the ability to
- Share codes with temporary, e2ee links
- Add notes, that are stored e2ee
- Trash and recover codes
- Access your data via CLI
- View codes in compact mode
- Install from Flathub

Full changelog is available [here](https://ente.io/blog/auth-v4).

We're now testing out Product Hunt by show casing Auth. If you've an account, [**please support**](https://www.producthunt.com/posts/ente-auth), it would mean the world to us! <:pepeheart:972766549960192070>

item.title: Hey @everyone, happy to share that Mozilla has selected Ente for the Mozilla Builders accelerator.
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, happy to share that Mozilla has selected Ente for the Mozilla Builders accelerator.

This means we will have access to their amazing resources along with a non-dilutive grant of $100k.

More details here: https://ente.io/blog/mozilla-builders

Mozilla grants Ente $100k

Ente has received a non-dilutive grant of $100,000 from Mozilla

item.title: Hey @everyone, here with a banger! 🎇
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, here with a banger! 🎇

# Guest View 🙅
Handing over your phone to show photos to a friend? Don't worry about them *over*-swiping.
Guest view will **lock them** into the photos you select!

# Panorama View 🤳
We've added support for viewing photos clicked in panorama mode.
The experience is immersive with Ente pairing with your device sensors for a **360 degree view**.

# Video Player ⏯️
We've rewritten our video player, incorporating all the feedback you've shared with us.
We've also added support for **HDR videos**, so your pixels will be rendered just the way they were captured.

# Face Recognition - Open Beta 🌚
Thanks to everyone who shared feedback during closed testing, Face recognition is now available to all! 🙏
Processing your existing library will be easier on [our desktop app](https://ente.io/download/desktop). You can enable this from `Preferences > Machine learning`.
On mobile, please check out `General > Advanced > Machine learning`.
### Note
- Derived embeddings and collected feedback will be preserved and synced E2EE.
- Any new photos you click will be indexed on mobile as they're backed up.

# Magic Search - Open Beta ✨
Magic search has undergone massive improvements, the quality of results will be better. We will provide an interface to facilitate discovery soon.
The same processing pipeline for Face Recognition will index your photos for magic search as well.

# and more 🫶
- Custom referral codes are available within `Settings > General > Referrals`. **Please reserve your code!**
- Multipart, resumable uploads are available under `Backup Settings` on mobile. This will massively improve the experience for uploading large files.
- You can configure Ente's CLI to exclude hidden and shared albums from exports.
- Map view for a photo will let you navigate to the location it was clicked in.
- You can multi-select and remove quick links, quickly.
- <@&1099362028147183759> now has a custom app lock, on all platforms.
- App lock (on both Auth and Photos) now comes with an option to hide contents from the app switcher.

We will now focus on performance and stability. If you run into issues, please share logs with `support@ente.io`!

### And you like what we're doing, please consider reviewing us on [AppStore](https://apps.apple.com/app/id1542026904) / [PlayStore](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.ente.photos) <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

item.title: Hey @everyone, we've listened to your feedback on Ente's pricing, and have executed on it.
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, we've listened to your feedback on Ente's pricing, and have executed on it.

We've dropped prices, increased storage, and introduced a free forever plan!

Please read the [**full announcement here**](https://ente.io/blog/pricing-update/) <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

Pricing update

Ente is now more affordable than ever.

item.title: Hey @everyone, here are some of the improvements we've shipped in our latest release.
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, here are some of the improvements we've shipped in our latest release.

## App lock 🔐

We've added a custom lock screen to mobile, that supports PINs and passwords. So you can protect your photos with either of these, instead of your device lock screen. Check out `Settings > Security > App lock` to get started.

## Select all ✅

We've added an option to select all items in the gallery that you're viewing. This should help with bulk updates and organization.

## Google Takeout improvements ⚡

We've shipped significant performance improvements to our Google Takeout import. Uploading the data you've exported from Google Photos will now be a breeze.

## Export enhancements ↕️

Speaking of portability, our data export feature is now more resilient. Ente's desktop app will gracefully recover from failures and make sure that it is easy for you to maintain a local copy of your data.

## Self hosting 🧑‍💻

Our desktop and mobile apps now support connecting to a self-hosted instance. You no longer have to build from source, a few clicks is all it'll take.

## Video metadata ⏯️

We've added support for parsing and viewing metadata from videos. This means we can now reliably parse location data and put them on the map. This change also takes us one step closer towards providing a first class experience for videos.

---
## Coming <:soon:1260903925360492554>
Just so you've visibility, these are the big ticket items we are working on at the moment:
- **Bug fixes & QoL improvements**
- Getting **Face recognition** to open beta
- Improving the accuracy of **Magic search**
- **Video streaming** on mobile, and
- something else that's not a feature, but will have a huge impact! 🤫

Looking forward to sharing more updates soon ! <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

item.title: Hi @everyone, we're hosting a **Live Stream** with [Notesnook](https://notesnook.com)'s founder <@268906913855438848> this weekend.
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hi @everyone, we're hosting a **Live Stream** with [Notesnook](https://notesnook.com)'s founder <@268906913855438848> this weekend.

We'll discuss Abdullah's journey, Notesnook's future, state of consumer privacy and some other hot topics! 🌶️

There'll be a **Live Q&A** as well, so please tune in! <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

https://discord.gg/qMDChcwN?event=1260191404877942814

item.title: Hey @everyone, here with a banger! 💥
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, here with a banger! 💥

# Ente Photos v0.9 <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>
One of our final pitstops as we inch closer to **v1.0**.
We've packed a bunch of beautiful features into this release, and we hope it'll make your day (or week)!

## Video editor ⏯️

This release introduces a video editor for our mobile app that will help you trim, crop and flip your videos. The editor works completely offline, and will help you accomplish your routine editing tasks.

## Passkeys 🔐

You can now secure your Ente accounts with passkeys and hardware keys. Head over to `Settings > Security > Passkeys` to get started. Please be mindful that passkeys has not gained widespread adoption, so save your recovery key if you haven't already!

## Large file explorer 🔍

The ability to "sort by size" was a highly requested feature. So we've added an option to view and clear unimportant files that are consuming your space. Check out `Settings > Backup > Free up space`.

## Send link ✨

This release also adds a bit of magic to link sharing. Select the photos you wish to share and click on `Send link` to make someone's day! 🎁

## and more 🫶

- Translations for Portuguese (Brazil), Russian, and Turkish
- Archived section for archived albums
- Dedicated section for Free up space
- Stability improvements for iOS

We will now dedicate time to improve app stability and machine learning across platforms.

---

# Live AMA 🙋

I'll be live on Discord this Saturday (22nd June), 4:00pm - 4:30pm GMT. Please [**ask me anything here**](https://www.live-ask.com/event/01J0DKGQ593GNTAEQDBWYN2T46)!

item.title: Hey @everyone, here to announce a major release for Auth!
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, here to announce a major release for Auth!
# Launching Auth v3.0 🚀
This is a major release for Auth, where we've shipped some much requested features, and polished some corners.
We hope you'll enjoy these improvements!

## Logo 🎨

We've crafted a logo for Auth, one that paints a better picture for what it stands for. It's gotten us a while to get here, and we've spent an unreasonable amount of time looking at pixels before picking this one. We hope you like it as much as we do!

## Tagging #️⃣

You can now organize your codes with tags ("Work" , "Personal", "Social", ...), and easily find what you're looking for. You can attach multiple tag to the same code, and all of this information will sync across your devices, end-to-end encrypted.

## Pinning 📌

Starting v3.0, you can pin your favorite / most frequently used codes to the top, to make sure they're always a single tap away. Just swipe right on a code to Pin / Unpin it. This information is also preserved, end-to-end encrypted.

## Steam codes 🎮

Steam comes with a non-standard protocol for it's second-factor codes, but starting this release we've added support for their format as well.

## Desktop support 🐧

Starting this release, Auth should be working flawlesly on all Linux variants. If you run into any issues, please create an issue on [our Github](https://github.com/ente-io/ente).

## Website! 🧑‍💻

Last, but not the least, we've launched a website for Auth. This is something we have poured a lot of love into, so do check it out and let us know how it looks! Also, we hope this will make it easy to share Auth with your friends!

# 👉 [ente.io/auth](https://ente.io/auth) 👈


---

Thanks for all the love so far! If you'd like to continue supporting us, please spread the word about Ente! <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

item.title: Hey @everyone, time for some goodies! 🎁
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, time for some goodies! 🎁

## Cast albums to TV 📺

You can now view a slideshow of your albums on ***any*** big screen. If you have a Chromecast device on the network, Ente will auto-pair. You can also open up `cast.ente.io` on any screen, and enter a 6 digit code to present an album.

## Organize shared items ❤️

You can favorite them, add them to your own albums, and organize them like yours. When you perform these actions, Ente will copy the shared items into your account, so they turn into hard copies that you own.

## Machine Learning ⚡️

We've shipped massive performance improvements to **Magic Search**. We've also updated our on-device Machine Learning infrastructure to make sure inference only runs when your device is healthy (in terms of battery and temperature).

If you haven't already, please enable the feature from `Settings > Advanced > Machine Learning`, and let us know if you face any jank.

## and more ✨

This release also comes packed with some quality-of-life improvements around Android widgets, background sync, search screen, gallery load-times and downloads; and the adoption of Material You components.

## and some more 🫶

- We've increased the storage included within Ente's free trial from 1 GB to **5 GBs**. We've also reset your trial timer, so you've 365 more days to explore the free space 🙂
- **Face Recognition** is almost ready. If you would like early access, please **[sign up here](https://forms.ente.io/s/clvrwn20u01ad8j6wpcbkvztu)**.

item.title: <@&1099362028147183759>'s desktop app is now live 🚀
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
<@&1099362028147183759>'s desktop app is now live 🚀

Thanks to everyone who helped us test, translate and bring this to life 🙏
## [Download from Github](https://github.com/ente-io/ente/releases/tag/auth-v2.0.50) 👈

item.title: Hey @everyone, we're back with an update!
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, we're back with an update!

Ente's latest release brings you
- **Widgets** on Android, so your Favourite memories are pinned to your home screen ❤️
- Fresh design for our **Discovery** tab, with a lot more bling ✨
- **Location clustering**, for popular cities 🗺️
- Plenty of performance improvements ⚡️

If you like what you see, please throw us some stars at [PlayStore](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.ente.photos) / [AppStore](https://apps.apple.com/app/id1542026904) / [GitHub](https://github.com/ente-io/ente) <:pepeheart:972766549960192070>

item.title: @everyone Ente is now **fully open source**.
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
@everyone Ente is now **fully open source**.

You can find the source to our apps and **server** @ [github.com/ente-io/ente](https://github.com/ente-io/ente) ✨

More details @ [ente.io/blog/open-sourcing-our-server](https://ente.io/blog/open-sourcing-our-server/)

Thank you for helping us get this far 🙏

Onwards and upwards 🚀

GitHub - ente-io/ente: Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alte...

Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos - ente-io/ente

Open sourcing our server

Ente’s servers join our clients - Ente is now fully open source

item.title: Hello @everyone!
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hello @everyone!

We've listened to your feedback and have introduced 2 new storage tiers to Ente – **50 GB** and **200 GB**.

Our updated plans are as follows:
- **50GB @ $2.99 / €2.99**
- **200GB @ $6.99 / €6.99**
- 500 GB @ $9.99 / €9.99
- 2000 GB @ $19.99 / €19.99

You will continue to have access to your existing plans and can upgrade (or downgrade) if our newer plans are a better fit.

Hope this helps! 🙂

item.title: Hi @everyone, we've shipped 2 widely requested features in our latest release ✨
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hi @everyone, we've shipped 2 widely requested features in our latest release ✨

- You can now view the location where a photo was clicked, within the Info section
- You can also search for popular cities (eg. "Zurich", "New York") to discover photos

There are more improvements on the way (including auto-clustering photos by these locations). Please keep your feedback coming! <:pepeheart:972766549960192070>

item.title: Hey @everyone, **Magic Search** is now running **everywhere** 🪄
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, **Magic Search** is now running **everywhere** 🪄

On mobile please switch this on from `Settings > General > Advanced > Machine learning`, and wait for the models to download and photos to get indexed ☕️

We'll enable this for everyone once we get a go ahead from you guys <:praypepe:973998204779655298>

item.title: Hey @everyone, thank you for hanging out with us. We wouldn't be here without you <:pepeheart:972766549960192070>
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, thank you for hanging out with us. We wouldn't be here without you <:pepeheart:972766549960192070>
Here's our 2023 wrap. Wish you a wonderful new year ahead! <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

https://ente.io/blog/2023/

Ente - 2023 Wrap

Reflecting on the year so far

item.title: Hey @everyone, our **Desktop app** now supports ✨ Magic Search on all platforms (including Windows). For those curious, here's an outline on
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, our **Desktop app** now supports ✨ Magic Search on all platforms (including Windows). For those curious, here's an outline on what's happening under the hood: https://ente.io/blog/clip-ggml-edge/

We're actively working on deploying the same model on mobile. Ironing out a few platform specific issues at the moment. With your help, we should be there soon <:pepeheart:972766549960192070>

CLIP with GGML on the Edge, in production

Running OpenAI's CLIP with GGML on Ente's desktop apps

item.title: Hey @everyone, early access to our Black Friday deals available @ [community.ente.io/blackfriday](https://community.ente.io/blackfriday) 👈
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, early access to our Black Friday deals available @ [community.ente.io/blackfriday](https://community.ente.io/blackfriday) 👈

*p.s. We're only selling 100 units and this is the cheapest Ente will ever be!* <:takemymoney:996377005908033588>

Ente - Black Friday 2023

Protect your photos and videos with Ente - a secure, cross-platform, open source, encrypted photos app. Automatic backups, end-to-end encryption, collaborative albums, family plans, library-sync, 1-click import, human support, locked photos, live photos, descriptions, private sharing, search and more.

item.title: Hello @everyone!
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hello @everyone!

✨ ** We've launched "magical search" on Linux and Mac** 🍾

You can grab the latest build from [ente.io/download/desktop](https://ente.io/download/desktop).

Once indexing is complete (status available @ `Sidebar > Preferences > Advanced`), you will be able to find your photos with natural language queries.

Technical documentation on what's happening behind the scenes, and support for more platforms coming soon!

In the meanwhile, feedback and bug reports would be very helpful! <:pepeheart:972766549960192070>

Semantic_Search.mp4

item.title: Hey @everyone! We're working on a [**new website**](https://next.ente.io) ✨
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone! We're working on a [**new website**](https://next.ente.io) ✨

If you'd like to drop us a review (on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/enteio) / [Mastodon](https://mstdn.social/@ente) / [PlayStore](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.ente.photos) / [AppStore](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ente-photos/id1542026904)), now would be a great time, we'd love to feature you! <:lilducky:1069841394929238106>

item.title: Hey @everyone, our CLI is now publicly available @ https://github.com/ente-io/cli 🧑‍💻
item.dc:creator: vishnu
item.description:
Hey @everyone, our CLI is now publicly available @ https://github.com/ente-io/cli 🧑‍💻

You can simply add your account (w/ `ente account add`), and start your export (w/ `ente export`) ⚡️

Please note that this is an "MVP" and we'll be prioritizing improvements based on your feedback. So give it a spin, and let us know what you'd like to see! 🙏

GitHub - ente-io/cli: CLI client for exporting data from ente Photos

CLI client for exporting data from ente Photos. Contribute to ente-io/cli development by creating an account on GitHub.
